meaning: adj.蟾ｴ蜴伜ｲ帷噪,蟾ｴ蜴倩ｯｭ逧⏋.蟾ｴ蜴倩ｯｭ
examples: The Balinese have the most extravagant funeral rites.
Balinese Hindus perform a purification ritual on Petitenget beach.
My mother, Saffire, a beautiful Balinese cat, was a raccoon in her last life.
He knows practically everyone in Ubud and has a deep knowledge of Balinese history and culture.
He wears a thick, curly mustache, and his face is long and straight, like a Balinese mask.
